feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: The Clearance-Centered Bottleneck in Alzheimer's Disease: From Coupled Glymphatic-Lymphatic Circuits to Therapeutic Opportunities.
drug.zh: 阿尔茨海默病核心瓶颈是脑类淋巴-淋巴耦合循环中“进入-转运-排出”三节点的多级失效。

drug.title: Nanomedicine targeting neuroinflammatory pathways in Alzheimer's disease: a new frontier in inflammopharmacology.
drug.zh: 纳米药物通过精准调控神经炎症通路，为阿尔茨海默病治疗开辟了抗炎药理新方向。

drug.title: Hospital Budget Impact and Provider-Side Economic Evaluation of Lecanemab and Donanemab Under Japan's National Fee Schedule: A Head-to-Head Linear Model.
drug.zh: 在日本医保体系下，Lecanemab和Donanemab的医院财务可行性取决于门诊输注量和诊断相关支付模式。

drug.title: Sex Differences in Dementia: Survival, Institutionalization, and Costs Based on Dutch Claims Data.
drug.journal: Journal of the American Medical Director
drug.zh: 荷兰全国数据显示，女性痴呆患者入住护理机构风险更高，但生存期更长且医疗成本更高。

drug.title: Tau-mediated Mechanisms in Alzheimer's Disease Pathogenesis.
drug.zh: Tau蛋白介导的病理机制是阿尔茨海默病认知衰退的关键驱动因素。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid nanobody-Fc fusion protein drives potent amyloid clearance through microglial recruitment.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白纳米抗体-Fc融合蛋白通过招募小胶质细胞高效清除淀粉样斑块，证实Fc效应功能对疗效至关重要。

drug.title: Statistical inference for saved time based on disease progression curves in Alzheimer's disease research.
drug.zh: 提出基于疾病进展曲线上方区域计算节省时间的闭合方差公式，解决了统计推断难题。

drug.title: Comparative risk of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities with anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibodies: A systematic review and penalized likelihood network meta-analysis of randomized trials.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病时，ApoE4携带者ARIA-E风险显著高于非携带者，不同药物风险差异明显。

mech.title: The Clearance-Centered Bottleneck in Alzheimer's Disease: From Coupled Glymphatic-Lymphatic Circuits to Therapeutic Opportunities.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病核心瓶颈是脑类淋巴-淋巴耦合循环中“进入-转运-排出”三节点的多级清除障碍。

mech.title: Correspondence: Erythrina caffra in cadmium-induced Alzheimer's-like pathology: A new candidate or a familiar pattern?
mech.zh: Erythrina caffra提取物改善镉诱导的阿尔茨海默样病理，但研究在模型、对照和病理标志物上存在关键缺陷。

mech.title: Serial failure of the brain clearance continuum in Alzheimer's disease: mechanisms and therapeutic perspectives.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病源于脑清除连续体逐级失效，而非单一通路障碍。

mech.title: Seipin modulates Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis by regulating ferroptosis through a glycine-mediated metabolic pathway.
mech.zh: Seipin通过甘氨酸代谢通路调控铁死亡，从而影响阿尔茨海默病发病进程。

mech.title: Relationships of CSF biomarkers to cortical atrophy in early-onset Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: 早发型阿尔茨海默病中，CSF神经丝轻链水平最能预测其特异性皮层萎缩。

mech.title: Recent breakthroughs in blood-based biomarkers of Alzheimer disease: opportunities and challenges in older adults.
mech.zh: 血浆p-tau217作为阿尔茨海默病血液标志物在老年人群中诊断性能稳健，但需注意合并症与衰弱的影响。

mech.title: Computational Evaluation of Oleuropein Interactions with Alzheimer's Disease-Related Proteins Using Molecular Docking and Molecular Dynamics.
mech.zh: 橄榄苦苷通过多靶点结合（Aβ、tau、ApoE4等）展现抗阿尔茨海默病潜力。

mech.title: Neuroprotective potential of marine-derived polysaccharide against Aβ42-induced toxicity in a Drosophila Alzheimer's disease model.
mech.zh: 海洋来源多糖通过抗氧化和抗炎机制在果蝇模型中显著减轻Aβ42毒性，展现阿尔茨海默病治疗潜力。

dx.title: Adaptive pathways for multimodal community-based detection of cognitive impairment: the CogScreen I study.
dx.zh: 社区多模式自适应筛查路径（整合主观、数字与生物指标）可有效提升老年认知障碍早期检出率。

dx.title: A multimodal machine learning model integrating plasma biomarkers and MRI metrics for non-invasive prediction of amyloid-β pathology in mild cognitive impairment.
dx.zh: 多模态机器学习整合血浆标志物与MRI指标，可无创高效预测轻度认知障碍患者的脑内Aβ病理状态。

dx.title: Prognostic value of plasma %p-tau217 in cognitively unimpaired older adults.
dx.zh: 血浆%p-tau217基线水平可精准预测认知正常老年人未来12年进展为轻度认知障碍的风险。

dx.title: Association Between Plasma GFAP and Medial Temporal Atrophy and Cognition in Amyloid-Negative Cerebrovascular Disease.
dx.zh: 血浆GFAP升高与淀粉样蛋白阴性脑血管病患者的颞叶萎缩及认知损害显著相关。

dx.title: Recent breakthroughs in blood-based biomarkers of Alzheimer disease: opportunities and challenges in older adults.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217作为阿尔茨海默病血液标志物在老年人群中诊断性能稳健，但需注意共病与衰弱的影响。

dx.title: Radical-Mediated In Situ Fluorescence Dye Deposition: A Simple Interfacial Signal Amplification Reaction for Ultrasensitive Immunoassay on Barcode Beads.
dx.zh: RIFD界面信号放大技术实现阿尔茨海默病超灵敏蛋白标志物检测。

dx.title: Blood-based multimodal biomarker models for differentiating early-onset Alzheimer's disease from frontotemporal dementia: a longitudinal study of early-onset dementia and family members (LEAF) study.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217和p-tau181可有效区分早发性阿尔茨海默病与额颞叶痴呆，诊断性能相当。

dx.title: Predictive value of plasma p-tau217 for Alzheimer's dementia compared to other blood-based biomarkers.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在9年内预测阿尔茨海默病风险优于p-tau181，与NfL和GFAP相当。

prev.title: Impact of modifiable risk factors, including diabetes, and diabetes-related complications, on dementia risk in older U.S. adults: mutually adjusted estimates from a population-based cohort.
prev.zh: 糖尿病相关并发症独立增加老年痴呆风险，其贡献与12项可调控因素相当。

prev.title: Multimodal Characterization of Age-Dependent Susceptibility to High-Cholesterol-Diet-Induced AD-like Alterations in WHBE Rabbits.
prev.zh: WHBE兔高胆固醇饮食诱导的AD样病变呈年龄依赖性，幼兔更易出现Tau磷酸化及Aβ沉积。

prev.title: Associations of Alzheimer Disease and Related Dementia Neuropathologies With Timely Diagnosis of Dementia in Healthcare Settings.
prev.zh: 阿尔茨海默病理改变与医疗环境中痴呆及时诊断的关联性不显著。

prev.title: EPIC4ND-European Prospective Investigation into Cancer and Nutrition follow-up for neurodegenerative diseases.
prev.zh: EPIC4ND大型前瞻性队列研究揭示，营养与生活方式等基线数据可预测未来30年内阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病风险。

prev.title: E326K GBA polymorphism is associated with clinical and pathological features of synucleinopathy in the absence of overt Parkinson's disease or Lewy body dementia.
prev.zh: E326K GBA多态性与无帕金森病或路易体痴呆者中突触核蛋白病的临床及病理特征相关。

prev.title: OpenMAP-BrainAge: generalizable and interpretable brain age predictor from MRI.
prev.zh: OpenMAP-BrainAge模型基于Transformer分析3D MRI，在异质性队列中实现精准、可解释的脑龄预测，且脑龄差与认知评分显著相关。

prev.title: Childhood maltreatment and joint trajectories of social isolation and depression as predictors of cognitive impairment in late midlife: a prospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 童年虐待通过中年期社交孤立与抑郁的联合轨迹，显著预测59岁时认知损伤风险。

prev.title: Frailty and accelerated dementia onset in genetic, sociodemographic and neuropathologic subgroups.
prev.zh: 衰弱显著加速痴呆发病，尤其在APOE ε4携带者及高神经病理负荷人群中。

intro.title: Oral Microbial Extracellular Vesicles as Novel Mediators of Alzheimer's Pathogenesis: A Critical Review of the Periodontal-Brain Axis.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是嘴里牙周炎的细菌会释放微小颗粒，可能顺着血液进入大脑，引发炎症，从而增加老年痴呆的风险。

intro.title: Peripheral and Central miRNA Signatures in Alzheimer's Disease: Tissue-Specific Variability, Sex-Associated Differences, and Implications for Blood-Based Biomarkers.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是科学家想通过血液里的微小信号分子来早期发现阿尔茨海默病，但男女和不同身体部位的信号有差异，提醒我们别盲目相信单一指标。

intro.title: Analysis of the Efficacy of Acetylcholinesterase Inhibitors in the Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease, Literature Review.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是治疗阿尔茨海默病的一种常用药到底有没有用，能帮你判断医生开的药值不值得吃。

intro.title: Metabolic reprogramming in Alzheimer's disease: Interaction between receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, noncoding RNAs, and Neuron-Glia energy networks.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是阿尔茨海默病其实是大脑“没电了”，并解释了能量出问题的原因，能帮你理解为什么预防要关注血糖和大脑营养。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨头变脆和脑子变傻之间可能通过免疫系统互相影响，帮普通人理解预防骨质疏松或许也能护脑。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的能量工厂出问题会加速老年痴呆，看懂它就能明白保护大脑要从哪里下手。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“化学信使”的小分子，在老年痴呆早期保护大脑、晚期却帮倒忙，还受性别和感染影响，帮普通人理解病情变化。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇研究讲的是细胞里一种叫“线粒体”的垃圾清理机制出问题会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个清理过程。
